items: A working briefing for Melissa Johnson, General Manager
Engagement began {{fact:f:E-2011-001.start}}
Prepared by Deborah Allen, with Jason Torres, Principal
Early-phase read: how we are set up and what we see so far, not recommendations

blocks.text: What you asked us to answer

items: Match the organization behind the web channel to the volume it now carries
Fix who owns the online channel end to end, and who decides what along it
Show what the channel costs to run today, in numbers your own finance team recognizes
Lay out a practical path from where you are to where the channel needs to be
We trace a real order from the web page to the shipping dock and mark every hand-off along the way
We start from your charts, your systems, and your own figures, not from a template
Deborah Allen builds the current-state map and the cost picture
Jason Torres owns the design and is your day-to-day contact

blocks.text: What we have set up so far

items: The data request is out, and the first order and cost figures are in and reconciling
Interviews with the channel managers are scheduled through the coming weeks
A first draft of the order path exists and is being checked against how the work is really done
No target structure is on the table yet, and none should be read into this briefing
Finish the interviews and close the current-state map
Turn the cost picture into a view by function, so spend can be read against who owns it
Bring the first findings to the next working session for discussion
Questions on the design to Jason Torres; anything on the data or systems to Deborah Allen
